name: Dimitrie Hoekstra
title: Product Manager
bio: Dimitrie leads the AI Focus product lane at FlowFuse, shaping how industrial IT/OT teams leverage AI to augment their desired outcomes.
facts: Product manager with a design engineering background in Open Source and DevOps
Traveled and worked across the world, now makes life work across three countries instead of one
I grab my motorbike for a trip whenever I can
